transcript:
Mike: Hey V, quick call. I reviewed your proposal and we want to move forward. Can you send over the contract?

V: Absolutely. When are you thinking of starting?

Mike: January 1st ideally. We have 15 engineers.

V: Perfect. I'll get the contract over today. You mentioned 15 engineers - are any of them contractors or all FTE?

Mike: All FTE. Some are remote but all full-time.

V: Got it. I'll include everyone in the contract. Anything else you need from me right now?

Mike: No, just the contract. Thanks!

V: On its way. Talk soon.
